Initial release of the CDC NHSN Digital Quality Measures (dQM) Content Package IG - US Realm

title: CDC National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN) Digital Quality Measures (dQM) Content Package IG
introduction: This content describes the specifications for the for the Health Level Seven International® (HL7) Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources® (FHIR) digital quality measures (dQMs) reported to the National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN).
